Models

Ekalopha1Beta

~36k parameters • Transformer (RoPE + GQA + SwiGLU)
5643 tokens/sec

Original baseline. Standard modern architecture.

Released

Ekalopha 1.5

~117k parameters • Pure Retention (RetNet-style, no softmax)
4200 tokens/sec

Completely different architecture. Exponential decay per head. Linear-time memory.

Released

200-Item Benchmark

Fixed 200-item benchmark (seed=42). Categories: Code, Math, Reasoning, is3de, Logic, Opsec.

Model Code Math Reasoning is3de Logic Opsec Overall Speed
Ekalopha1Beta 0.0%4.0%0.0%-0.0%- 1.0% 5643 t/s
Ekalopha 1.5 17.5%0.0%0.0%-2.5%- 5.5% 4200 t/s
Ekalopha 1--------
Ekalopha Heavy--------
Ekalopha 2--------

Ekalopha 1.5 (Pure Retention) shows 5.5× improvement over baseline.

Downloads

All files self-contained. Direct base64 downloads.

Ekalopha1Beta (~36k params) • Transformer

ekalopha.py ekalopha1.pt ekalopha1beta.ekalopha
Code + quick start
benchmark.py results 
# Quick start
python ekalopha.py --chat
python ekalopha.py --prompt "What is 19 plus 23?"

ekalopha15.py ekalopha15.pt ekalopha15.ekalopha
Code + quick start
benchmark.py results

python ekalopha15.py --chat
python ekalopha15.py --prompt "What is 100 plus 44?"
